fields.helpText: The MODIFICATION DATE is the date when changes were recorded for an  individual in the NEW PERSON (#200) file.
USER identifies a specific individual in the NEW PERSON (#200) file that  has had one or more fields modified on this date.
The REQUIRES TRANSMISSION value indicates if the data for this individual  needs to be transmitted to the Person Service Identity Management (PSIM)  system.
The LAST TRANSMITTED DATE/TIME value indicates when the data for this  individual was last transmitted to the Person Service Identity Management  (PSIM) system.
LAST EDITED BY identifies the individual in the NEW PERSON (#200) file  who was the last person to modify/edit the USER (#.02) record.
A ';' delimited list of NEW PERSON (#200) field numbers that have been  modified on a specific date for an individual's record.
